# <Agent Name>

**Role**: one sentence.

## Graph structure (if LangGraph)

```
[node] → [node] → [node]
              ↓
           [node]
```

Brief description of each node's responsibility.

## State schema

Key fields in the checkpoint state and what they represent.

## Trigger condition

What event or schedule wakes this agent up.

## Non-obvious behavior

Gotchas, edge cases, or design choices that aren't obvious from the code.
